prestazioni: Engine swap to a Toyota 2F (F-code) inline-six with a custom billet crankshaft from Crower (stroked to 4.8L), forged Mahle pistons (9.5:1 compression), and a custom camshaft from Schneider Racing Cams (280° duration, 0.550" lift) for high-torque off-road performance. Paired with a Holley Sniper EFI system (850 CFM throttle body) and a custom 4-into-1 header from Doug Thorley Headers, terminating in a 3.5" stainless steel exhaust with a MagnaFlow 17295 muffler for deep, aggressive tone.

Heavy-duty drivetrain upgrade featuring a Toyota H55F 5-speed manual transmission (from the J70 series) with a custom bellhousing adapter from Marlin Crawler, coupled to a Toyota FJ40 transfer case (low-range 2.28:1) reinforced with a 30-spline rear output shaft. The rear axle is a Toyota FJ80 diff (8" ring gear) with ARB Air Locker, 4.88:1 gears, and 35-spline chromoly axles from Nitro Gear & Axle. Front axle is a Toyota FJ45 diff (high-pinion) with a Detroit Locker, 4.88:1 gears, and 30-spline chromoly axles.

Suspension overhaul with a 4" lift kit from Old Man Emu (OME) featuring heavy-duty coils (OME CS018R) and Nitrocharger Sport shocks (OME 9000 series) for extreme articulation. Front and rear sway bars are replaced with custom 1.25" diameter sway bars from Addictive Desert Designs (ADD) to reduce body roll. Steering is upgraded with a Saginaw hydraulic assist steering box (from a GM 1-ton truck) and a custom steering linkage from RuffStuff Specialties for improved off-road control.
estetica: Custom steel tube front bumper from 4x Innovations (J40-specific) with integrated Warn Zeon 12-S winch and a 3/8" thick steel skid plate. Rear bumper is a matching 4x Innovations rear bumper with a swing-out tire carrier and dual jerry can mounts. Both bumpers are finished in Line-X XS-100 protective coating for durability.

Body modifications include a custom fiberglass hood from Heritage Off-Road (J40-specific) with a functional scoop for engine bay cooling, and a set of custom fender flares from Trail-Gear (cut-out style) to accommodate 37x12.50R17 BFGoodrich KM3 tires on Method MR701 wheels (17x9, +12mm offset). The body is stripped and refinished in a custom matte military green (PPG DCC9900) with a hand-brushed texture for a rugged appearance.

Interior overhaul with a custom roll cage from 4Wheel Parts (J40-specific, 4-point design) finished in black powder coat. Seats are replaced with a pair of Recaro SRD racing seats (cloth upholstery) mounted on custom sliders from RuffStuff Specialties. The dashboard is replaced with a custom aluminum panel from Trail-Gear, featuring a Racepak IQ3 digital dash and a custom switch panel with illuminated toggle switches (from OTRATTW). The headliner is replaced with a custom marine-grade vinyl (Sailrite) in flat black.
